calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Judgment; Request For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Mar-02-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENTS DANIEL MCCOMB AND GALE ELSTON'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment; Request For Attorney Fees.
APPEARANCE: Mark A. Senick, Esq. 252-9800 for opposing parties Patrick McComb and Maile Waters; H. Nelson Meeks, Esq. of Law Offices of H. Nelson Meeks 989-9915 for respondents & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court grants the motion to set aside/vacate the order confirming the arbitration award and denies the request for attorney fees. Parties to comply with contract and go back to Justice Low. Mr. Meeks to prepare proposed order. (301/JLW/DS) Judge: James L. Warren, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
